benchmark: Stage 20 bucketed ETC exact vs WLD audit
description: Compare ETC separately inside the exact-endgame bucket and the dedicated WLD pre-exact bucket on the same 14-empty black-to-move seed set.

bucketDefinitions.exact: Root exact-endgame search with empties <= exactEndgameEmpties. ETC toggle: enhancedTranspositionCutoff.
bucketDefinitions.wld: Root WLD pre-exact search with exactEndgameEmpties < empties <= exactEndgameEmpties + wldPreExactEmpties. ETC toggle: enhancedTranspositionCutoffWld.
